title: Malaiyoram Veesum Kaatru Lyrics Paadu Nilave Song Lyrics
stanzas:
Song: Malaiyoram Veesum Kaatru
Movie : Paadu Nilave
Music : Ilayaraja
Singer(s) : S. P. Balasubrahmanyam
Lyrics: Vaali

Malaiyoram veesum kaathu
manasodu paadum paatu kekkudhaa ? kekkudhaa ?
malaiyoram veesum kaathu
manasodu paadum paatu kekkudhaa ? kekkudhaa ?

Aararo paadinaalum aararo aagathamma
sonthangal thedinaalum thandhai thaai aagathamma
ennoda thaai thantha paatu thanamma
malaiyoram veesum kaathu
manasodu paadum paatu kekkutha ? kekkutha ?

Vaan parantha then sittu naan pudikka varatha ?
kallirukkum rosa poo kaikalakka koodatha?
raapozhuthu aana un raagangal thaana ?
anbe soll naana thoda aagatha aana ?
ull moochu vanginen
ull meethu thoonginen
illaatha baramellam nenjodu thanginen
nilava naalum thedum vaanam naan

Malaiyoram veesum kaathu
manasodu paadum paatu kekkutha ? kekkutha ?

Kuththalathu then aruvi sittaada thaan kattaadha
sittaadaiya katti yezha kaiyil vanthu kittaadha
aathoram nanal poongathodu aada
avaram poovil athu dhevaaram paada
inga naan kaathirukka en paarvai poothirkka
engeyo nee irunthu en meethu porthodukka
kollaathe pavam intha jeevan than

Malaiyoram veesum kaathu
manasodu paadum paatu kekkutha ? kekkutha ?
malaiyoram veesum kaathu
manasodu paadum paatu kekkutha ? kekkutha ?

Aararo paadinaalum aararo aagathamma
sonthangal thedinaalum thandhai thaai aagathamma
ennoda thaai thantha paatu thanamma
malaiyoram veesum kaathu
manasodu paadum paatu kekkutha ? kekkutha ?

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song?

The song expresses the beauty of love and the emotions tied to it, highlighting the connection between nature and feelings.

In which movie is this song featured?

This song is featured in the movie Paadu Nilave.

Who is the singer of this song?

The song is sung by the legendary singer SPB.

Who composed the music for this song?

The music for this song was composed by Ilayaraaja.

When was this song released?

This song was released in the year 2014.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Malaiyoram Veesum Kaatru, the protagonist reflects on the beauty of love through a soothing melody that evokes deep emotions. The song is a heartfelt expression of longing and connection, perfectly encapsulating the romantic essence of the movie Paadu Nilave. With SPB's enchanting vocals and Ilayaraaja's masterful composition, it resonates with anyone who has experienced love. This timeless piece serves as a reminder of the power of music in conveying profound feelings.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Malaiyoram Veesum Kaatru from Paadu Nilave is a mesmerizing melody that beautifully captures the essence of love and longing. With the legendary SPB's soulful voice and Ilayaraaja's enchanting composition, this song transports listeners to a world of romantic bliss. Experience the magic of this timeless classic that resonates with every heart.
stanzaMeanings: Does the wind from the mountain sing a song with the heart? Does it? Does the wind from the mountain sing a song with the heart? Does it?
Even if I sing 'Aararo', even if I search for my own, my mother gave me a song, does the wind from the mountain sing a song with the heart? Does it?

When the sky is filled with honey, will I not come to enjoy it? Can the rose that grows on the stone not be touched? Is it your melodies that come in the evening? My love, can I say that I am not able to? I have taken in the breath, I have not slept over it, I have carried all the burdens with my heart, I am searching for the moon, I am searching for the sky.
Does the wind from the mountain sing a song with the heart? Does it?

The sweet waterfall is not just a trickle, it is not just a trickle that comes to my hands. The flower blooms in the garden, it is divine, I am waiting here to sing. Where is my gaze directed? Don't come from anywhere to cover me, this life is unfortunate.
Does the wind from the mountain sing a song with the heart? Does it? Does the wind from the mountain sing a song with the heart? Does it?
Even if I sing 'Aararo', even if I search for my own, my mother gave me a song, does the wind from the mountain sing a song with the heart? Does it?
